title: Hair Care and Beauty Services Mission and Vision
content:
Hair Care and Beauty Services Mission and Vision

Our Mission

To ensure the training of Hair Care and Beauty Services Professionals who are equipped with superior knowledge and skills, prone to teamwork and a culture of sharing, and sensitive to public health and responsibilities, in line with scientific, technological and contemporary values, through training programs prepared in accordance with national and international professional criteria.

Our Vision

To be a leading educational institution that can easily adapt to changing scientific and social conditions with quality education and training activities, has high standards in the knowledge, skills and technological developments required by contemporary vocational education, and produces graduates who are sought after in national and international platforms.
